title: AutoBroadcast
description: An autobroadcast plugin with high customizability for spigot-based servers.
body:
# AutoBroadcast
This project was a fork of [ToggleIP/AutoBroadcast](https://github.com/ToggleIP/AutoBroadCast)

```yaml
# config.yml (Template)

messages:
  - "&bMessage 1"
  - "&dMessage 2"
  - "&5Message 3"
  - "&9Message 4"

# Interval between Broadcasts In Seconds
interval: 120

# Play a sound when Broadcasting
sound: false
```
